en: Aping, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
Aping, are you home?

ab: Uka Aping ilumaq ti. Ilung saak, miku-aq dau tu? na taqu-ak is musuqis in.
ch: B:Aping不在家耶!我是Ilung，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Aping。
en: Aping is not at home. I am Ilung. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: Qudas, Abus i Aping saam, to-av ang hilav un!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Abus和Aping，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Abus and Aping, please open the door for us.
Who is it?
I am Lumav, I am here for Vilian.
Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Talmadia ni-i sasadu-an tu, masalpudengaz saak su-u.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.
Aping, I am here to play with you.
Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: Inaak nepi sinsuaz tu hutan, siza-i tanam ma-un!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Hanuin! inaak nepi sinsuaz tu konunkonun, siza-i tanam ma-un.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.
The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Malunqu-a ti! Tanam ma-un i inaak sinsuaz ni-i tu pa-ihu-an tu pu-i kun!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: Ehi! Madavusdengaz a pu-i kun konun tu.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: Ni-i saak maqtu ma-un izuk si-a-av i salvi ta.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.
Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.

ab: Masala saak konunkonun i na konun su-u.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Unin ang, madia vuus konun a konunkonun un.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.
I will bring you some water.
Thank you.

ab: pinmade-av ma-un, madia naak a sinhanat pan-e-an.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: Ehi! Tuza tu mahansumdengaz amin masihaldengaz is konun.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: pinmade-av ma-un, madiadengaz ang a na maqtu konun un.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I ate it!

ab: pinmade-av ma-un, madiadengaz ang a na maqtu konun un.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: Madia in naak a konun a, las-upa-an in saak.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
